orchestrator_bug_surfaced_and_worked_aro: drawtext caption escape strips single backslash; colons in captions break ffmpeg filtergraph. Worked around in spec via colon-free captions (commit 610862b); proper fix is `\\:` double-escape OR single-quoted text= value in executor compose_grid_mp4.
